title: Build a reusable UVM agent for an interface
description: Encapsulate driver, monitor, and sequencer in an agent so each interface is stimulated and observed consistently.
body: Use when verifying a design with one or more standard interfaces. Do not drive signals directly from the test, since that defeats reuse and observability. Actions: build a driver that consumes sequence items, a monitor that publishes observed transactions, and a sequencer feeding the driver. Validation signals include the monitor reconstructing transactions that match the driver and the agent reusable across tests. Risk boundary: an agent that only drives but does not monitor hides failures, so deny sign-off on an interface whose monitor does not observe traffic.
